storyInfo: Ratatos meets again with the Victorian ambassador and drops a hint about eliminating Arctosz. Joanna and Enya break the ice, but they are once again attacked by assassins.

attributes.content: Arrggghhh! Didn't I tell you not to bother me today?
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Who's—
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: ...Sister.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: What are you doing here...?
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Don't just stand there, take a seat. What's the matter, can't sleep?
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I thought I told Yucatan to keep a close eye on you—
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: No...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: She shakes her head.
I told Yucatan not to come with me.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I wanted to talk to you, one-on-one.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Ratatos never thought she would see this expression on her sister, who is usually so cheerful and straightforward.
Alright. But only for a little bit. Then you go back to bed.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: *sigh* Acting like a little girl, when you're supposed to be a mom already.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I heard Arctosz shouting in the drawing room today.
attributes.name: Sciurus
Ratatos
attributes.content: Damn, so he did disturb you?

attributes.name: Ratatos
attributes.content: I'll have his hairy head for this.
No, it's not that...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I heard what you were arguing about, and I know many bad things have been happening lately...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Please, Rata... if you do know something, tell me.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: You shouldn't be worrying about these things right now, Sciurus.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: You'll have plenty to worry about once you take my job.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: But there's been trouble after trouble. Even I, shut up in my room, can tell that things are getting worse...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I see unhappy faces outside the window every day, not to mention we haven't heard anything back from Monch.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I have people searching for her... I'm sure she's fine. Hey, don't forget that she's one of the finest Browntail warriors!
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I know...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: It's you I'm really worried about, Rata.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I've never helped very much, but there was a time when I could at least stand by your side and give you my support...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: But now, you're facing all this on your own... I wish you would talk to me more.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: There's no need to carry everything on your shoulders. Yucatan and I have your back, no matter what.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: You think too much, my silly little sister. Are you really in such a hurry to take over for me?
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: That's not what I—
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I promise you, Sciurus.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I'll protect you, and Yucatan, and all of Clan Browntail.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: If it's the last thing I do.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Kjeragandr be my witness.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Still don't believe me? But you've got to believe Kjeragandr, right?
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: There's no need to go that far...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Alright... then promise me you're going to bed now.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Tomorrow will be a better day.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: You honor me with your invitation, Madam Browntail.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: I take it your thinking has changed, then?
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: ...Cut the crap.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Assassinating the members of Clan Silverash and Clan Paleroche, driving a rift between the three clans... is this how you intend to coerce me into working with you?
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I thought Victorian politicians were smarter than that.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: The man smiles nonchalantly.
I'm not sure how such a notion could have occurred to you, Madam Browntail.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Assassinating the leadership of another country on their own soil... it would be tantamount to a declaration of war... if it could be proven.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Are you sure you want to accuse Victoria of such crimes?
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: So this is why you people seem so smug about yourselves.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I'm not sure I understand your meaning.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: But since you've deigned to meet with me today, I am very happy to listen—is there anything I can help you with?
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Go on, act smug. Your crude little plot worked, huh? The relationship between the Paleroches and Browntails has broken down completely, and I've become the most suspicious one here.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: As for Enciodes... he just spun his tale about all three clans wanting stability to hoodwink that fool Arctosz.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: He knows full well that, in the present state of Kjerag, should the leader of any of the clans meet an 'accident', it would take little effort to demoralize the already-disheartened people.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: If he learns of our meeting, he will not hesitate to join forces with the Paleroches to attack me, even if he knows full well I wouldn't promise you anything.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: After all, what Kjerag needs right now is a culprit, one to place all the blame on.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: In that event, it's entirely possible that Clan Browntail will be wiped off the map.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: ...I don't have much time left.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: My sympathies, madam. I am in full agreement with your assessment of the situation.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Do you intend to turn things around, then?
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Let's get straight to the point.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: First, I want an absolute guarantee that you will prioritize the safety of Clan Browntail and the people of my domain, no matter what happens.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Of course. We have long sympathized with the ordinary folk who have become marginalized by Clan Silverash. It is one of our major goals for peaceful cooperation with Kjerag.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Ugh... say whatever you want.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Second, all the trade policies currently in place will remain so when Clan Browntail takes over from Karlan Trade, and Victoria must not withdraw any assistance currently offered to Kjerag.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Otherwise, we reserve the right to terminate our cooperation with immediate effect—not something you want to happen.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: You need not worry, madam. We are more than eager to cooperate with Kjerag, and would never dream of undermining this partnership.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: There will be much room for further cooperation, once you become the sole representative of your nation.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Good...
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Taking over Karlan Trade isn't something that can be accomplished overnight. We need time to prepare... and the first order of business is to deal with Arctosz.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I know that man, and he will come looking for trouble if he finds out Clan Browntail has been working with Victoria.
attributes.name: Ratatos
Ratatos
attributes.content: In a sense, he is an even bigger problem than Enciodes...

attributes.name: Ratatos
attributes.content: That bloody fool!
Most regrettable...
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: The decision is yours, Madam Browntail. How should we... persuade Arctosz?
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: I will contact him again... for one final meeting.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Oh?
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: There is an old Browntail manor at the foot of the mountains in the southwest, an area that is virtually uninhabited.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I will send Arctosz a message, telling him to meet me there tomorrow, where I will explain the truth.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: The time of the meeting is set at 7pm... fifteen hours from now.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I hope Victoria will demonstrate its good faith.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Of course. You will not be disappointed.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: We look forward to your 'persuasion' of Clan Paleroche.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: The mountain wind carries the snow, battering the hay-thatched roof.
A few dry leaves are blown into the air, landing on the braids of the girl sitting on the rooftop. She picks it out and rubs it in her fingers.
The Rift Cloudbeast pokes its head out from behind the girl's shoulders, rubbing against her red cheeks.
Rift Cloudbeast...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I'm just... clearing my head. You don't have to come out and be cold with me together.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The little white creature, which has endured many harsh days and nights with Joanna, purrs gently.
Thanks...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I... I don't know how to face the Saintess...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: She's the vicar of Kjeragandr. I should love and honor her, but—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: How could those things happen... Why must my family be punished...?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The girl sits quietly on the roof, Rift Cloudbeast in her arms, until the fine snowflakes cover her hair in white.
The door leading to the backyard is pushed open.
The visitor has added a few shallow footprints on the snow. Enya sees three scattered crossbows as she walks to her left, and picks up one to examine it.
It is smaller than the one that Joanna uses.
Enya casts her gaze in front, and there are three targets standing a short distance away, with a few bolts on them that have yet to be retrieved.
They started training at such a young age...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: There is a name on the stock... does it belong to her siblings?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya's attention is drawn to a bunch of sculptures scattered haphazardly on the ground at the other end of the yard. Their visage is a familiar one.
Enya approaches the largest amongst them and holds it before her. The sculptor was obviously extremely skilled—Kjeragandr is smiling gently upon her.

attributes.name: Enya
attributes.content: This is...

attributes.name: Enya
attributes.content: just like the one we built at Lake Silberneherze.
I guess this is what they all think you look like.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: There are other sculptures lying by her feet, and Enya picks up one of them.
This one is sleeker, the chisel marks on the face rougher, giving it a sense of harshness. Perhaps the sculptor had used too much force when sculpting the face, and chiseled off a little too much.
It's not right, is it? Doesn't look like Kjeragandr at all.
attributes.name: Kjarr

attributes.content: The face needs to be a little thinner, and the body...
attributes.name: Kjarr

attributes.content: Will you heed the plea of your humble handmaiden, Saintess?
attributes.name: Kjarr

attributes.content: Enya, pleeease—
attributes.name: Kjarr

attributes.content: See? It looks better when the face is rounder.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: She carefully puts the two sculptures of different sizes back.
In this bare, unfamiliar backyard, Enya puts her hands together and prays toward the statue of Kjeragandr, as the elders of Vine-Bead Court often do.
She does not make any wish. She only hopes for a miracle.
The sun has set, but the huntress still sits in the yard.
She hurriedly gets up to bow when she sees Enya, but the latter lays a hand on her shoulder.
...Saintess.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: No need for formalities. It's just us two.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I would prefer it if you could call me 'Enya'.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: As you wish.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: After greeting Enya, the girl looks aside and falls quiet again.
There were a lot of Kjeragandr sculptures in the backyard. Did you and your family make them yourselves?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: (Nods in silence)
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: They look a little different. Is it because people interpret the image of Kjeragandr depicted in the old books differently?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: My dad made the ones that looked like Her. I made the ones that don't...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Pfft—
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I'm sorry! I just wanted to ask... why did you make all those sculptures?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: My family is a branch of Clan Paleroche that went into the mountains on Kjeragandr's orders. We've been hunters ever since.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: We believe all that lives in the mountains share Kjeragandr's soul, and we are all part of the eternal cycle of life within Her.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: In gratitude for the blessings of Kjeragandr, every member of our family must learn to sculpt the image of Kjeragandr once we are old enough to hunt alone.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: We also make leather jackets, bone sculptures and accessories with Her mark.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: 'Hear, blessed hunter.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: 'Are the whispers of the wind and the grass not Her hymns? Are the creatures that walk and fly not She embodied?'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: 'The cycle of life and death is the cycle of water and ice; there is neither beginning nor end.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: 'Speak of Kjeragandr's wisdom and love, and listen.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: 'Rely not on signs and omens, but seek upon snow-covered peaks'... and then... and then—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: 'And become one with Her.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Yes... this part feels different from the other parts of Kjeragandr. I always get stuck here.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The details of the scriptures are not what matters the most. What's important is to be constantly mindful that Kjeragandr watches and listens to our words and deeds.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You may not remember the complicated verses, but you're living, hunting, and sculpting in accordance with Her teachings.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Even as the Saintess... I may never have truly understood the meaning of this passage, if I hadn't met you.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You're one of the most pious faithful I've ever met. Kjeragandr will protect your family.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Really?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Yes. I'm Her... chosen Saintess, after all. She will appear when we need her most, no matter what hardship we face.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: *sob*—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Tears roll down the young cheeks of the huntress who always puts on a strong front, falling and melting the snow by their feet.
Joanna? What's the matter? Can you tell me?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I, I—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Enya takes Joanna's trembling hands in hers.
When I first learned to hunt, I was bitten by an Infected beast... and I got Oripathy...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Dad hunted every day and made those sculptures after coming back from the hunt, so that he could sell them in town to buy medicine for me... and he did it for years...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: A few days ago, dad's friend told me... he was at the station... the day the Catastrophe happened...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: If I didn't—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Joanna...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Why, Kjeragandr...?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The grieving girl drops to the ground, curled up in a fetal position.
Enya kneels by her side, trying to find words of consolation, but for all the scriptures she has memorized, none have an answer. After a brief hesitation, she begins patting the girl's back.
There is a lump in her throat. If even eternal Kjeragandr can fall silent, what could Her Saintess possibly do?
Are you listening, Kjarr...?
Sitting by the window, the Rift Cloudbeast suddenly growls with as much volume as it can muster, and darts back into Joanna's hood.
Joanna sniffles and wipes her tears with her palms.
Someone's coming. I'll get the door.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Young lady...
attributes.name: Passing Old Man

attributes.content: How do I get to the nearest town?
attributes.name: Passing Old Man

attributes.content: Are you lost? Do you see those lights? Follow the trail down the mountain, and follow the lights whenever you come to a crossroads—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: It's getting dark... and my eyesight is poor...
attributes.name: Passing Old Man
Joanna
attributes.content: I'll walk with you—

attributes.name: Joanna
attributes.content: No... I can't leave right now.
You could spend the night here, and head down once the sun rises.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: No, no, I shouldn't trouble you. I'll find the path down the mountain...
attributes.name: Passing Old Man

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Just an old man who got lost.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You're quite far from town. Do people pass by here often?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: No. My family are the only ones who live here. We don't see many passersby. In fact, you were the first...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: —Look out!
attributes.name: Enya
